changed: Decoupled live notion editor typing from full workspace rerenders.
Moved notion autosave to a 10-second interval and kept explicit metadata save behavior.
Added a short TTL cache for authenticated mutation preflight.
Fixed public blog/work slug routes in production-style runtime by making search-param readers Suspense-safe.
Flattened duplicate folder layers under WoongBlog.Application and WoongBlog.Api, and renamed redundant infrastructure identity foldering.
Flattened the redundant WoongBlog.Infrastructure/Infrastructure root layer into WoongBlog.Infrastructure/*.
Realigned backend namespaces and test references across Application, Api, Infrastructure, and backend tests.
notChanged: Preview cards still render explicit excerpt text.
Broader backend naming beyond duplicated layers was not fully redesigned.

validations.command: PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 npx playwright test tests/mobile-public-navigation.spec.ts tests/public-blog-pagination.spec.ts tests/public-works-pagination.spec.ts tests/public-seo-metadata.spec.ts tests/public-blog-toc-layout.spec.ts tests/ui-admin-notion-autosave-info.spec.ts --workers=1

risks: Longer autosave interval means a larger unsaved in-memory window.
Mutation session TTL caching prefers fewer network round-trips over strict preflight freshness.
Backend namespace cleanup is substantial but not the final architectural end-state.
recommendation: Accept this pass and, if notion typing still feels heavy in real use, profile the Tiptap serialization path next.
